embed.alt: A fast-paced 15-second comedic montage in a cozy living room: a man patiently tries to teach his cat to “sit,” holding a treat and calmly repeating “Sit.” Quick cuts of the cat doing everything except sitting—rolling over, sprinting off, climbing the couch, then knocking something off a table—while the man reacts with growing disbelief. Smash cut to the final shot: the cat is perfectly still in a serene zen meditation pose on a pillow, eyes half-closed, paws tucked like a monk. The man pauses, nods with respect, and deadpans: “Close enough.” End on the comedic beat with a subtle freeze-frame.

embed.alt: A fast-paced, brightly lit infomercial-style commercial for a novelty product called “Micro Squeegee”, an ultra-small handheld squeegee designed for drying tiny hard-to-reach spots after washing up.
